game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **文字挂机传奇:王者战神**: This is a text-based idle RPG where the player's character automatically engages in combat against enemies in a continuous loop, with battle outcomes and resource gains displayed in a real-time text log. Players interact by tapping on on-screen notifications to collect accumulated gold, experience points, and crafting materials, which accrue even when the game is closed. Progression involves spending these resources in menu-driven interfaces to upgrade core character stats like Attack, Defense, and Health Points, or to unlock and enhance passive and active skills. New equipment, categorized by rarity (e.g., 1-star to 5-star), is automatically equipped if superior or can be manually managed, providing significant stat boosts. The game advances through sequential zones, each featuring increasingly difficult enemies and boss encounters that require a minimum power level to overcome, with no permanent loss state as the character simply respawns to continue idling.
game_info.description: You are a legendary warrior on an endless quest for power! Your character automatically battles through zones filled with monsters and bosses. Collect gold, experience, and equipment by pressing SPACE when notifications appear. Upgrade your Attack, Defense, and HP using arrow keys in the upgrade menu. Equip better gear as you find it. Progress through increasingly difficult zones to prove you are the ultimate warrior. Death only slows you down - your legend never ends!
game_info.controls:
SPACE: Collect rewards when notifications appear
UP/DOWN Arrow: Navigate upgrade menu or scroll combat log
LEFT/RIGHT Arrow: Switch between Combat and Upgrade screens
Z: Confirm upgrade purchase
ENTER: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to title screen

TEST_1.test_description: Basic functionality test. Validates that the game initializes correctly, player can navigate menus, collect rewards, and basic combat mechanics work. Tests switching between combat and upgrade screens.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Navigate between combat and upgrade screens using arrow keys. Attempt to collect rewards when available. Try to purchase upgrades if resources permit. Monitor that combat continues automatically and state updates properly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Game runs without errors. Screen transitions work correctly. Combat log updates continuously. Notifications appear and can be collected. Upgrade menu is accessible and functional. Test is successful if all basic interactions work for 300 frames without crashes.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition test through optimal progression strategy. Tests whether a player can reach zone 5 and defeat the final boss by efficiently collecting rewards and upgrading stats in optimal order.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Aggressively collect all notifications immediately when they appear. Prioritize Attack upgrades first for faster kills, then HP for survivability, then Defense. Spend resources as soon as sufficient gold is available. Maintain efficient resource collection to maximize upgrade speed.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player progresses through all zones by continuously upgrading stats. Defeats increasingly difficult enemies and bosses. Reaches zone 5 and defeats the final boss within reasonable time frame. GAME_OVER_WIN state is achieved, confirming win condition works correctly.
